{% extends "!layout.html" %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- if pagename.startswith("zh/") -%} {%- set pyna_lang = "zh" -%} {%- elif pagename.startswith("en/") or pagename.startswith("notebooks/") -%} {%- set pyna_lang = "en" -%} {%- else -%} {%- set pyna_lang = "root" -%} {%- endif %} {% endblock %} {% block docs_body %} {% include "translation-badge.html" %} {{ super() }} {% endblock %}
